passives.name: Char
passives.effects: Your next ability hit applies a {{as|Burn}} that deals {{ft|{{pp|5 to (2*5) for 11|0 to 2000|key=%|type='''maximum''' health difference|showtype=false|round=3|color=health}} {{as|(+ {{pp|2/10 to (2*2)/10 for 11|0 to 2000|key=%|type='''maximum''' health difference|showtype=false|round=3}} per 1 Lethality)|lethality}} {{as|(based on '''maximum''' health difference)|hp}} {{as|of the target's '''current''' health}} {{as|physical damage}} seconds over 4 seconds.|{{pp|5/8 to (2*5/8) for 11|0 to 2000|key=%|type='''maximum''' health difference|showtype=false|round=3|color=health}} {{as|(+ {{pp|0.2/8 to (2*0.2)/8 for 11|0 to 2000|key=%|type='''maximum''' health difference|showtype=false|round=3}} per 1 Lethality)|lethality}} {{as|(based on '''maximum''' health difference)|hp}} {{as|of the target's '''current''' health}} {{as|physical damage}} every {{fd|0.5}} over 4 seconds.}}

effects_structured.raw: Your next ability hit applies a {{as Burn}} that deals {{ft {{pp 5 to (2*5) for 11 0 to 2000 key=% type='''maximum''' health difference showtype=false round=3 color=health}} {{as (+ {{pp 2/10 to (2*2)/10 for 11 0 to 2000 key=% type='''maximum''' health difference showtype=false round=3}} per 1 Lethality) lethality}} {{as (based on '''maximum''' health difference) hp}} {{as of the target's '''current''' health}} {{as physical damage}} seconds over 4 seconds

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model review: this effect arms on item readiness and is consumed by the next qualifying ability hit, then burns over 4 seconds with 0.5-second tick cadence.
Burn scaling depends on target-vs-user maximum-health difference (capped by tooltip rule at 2500 difference) plus lethality scaling.
